title: Why AI Models Pause to Think: Test Time Compute Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains how test-time compute allows AI models to pause and perform deliberate reasoning during inference to solve harder problems. The video covers test-time compute, chain of thought reasoning, and how large language models use these techniques to boost accuracy.
